title: Coalition criticises Labor over electricity prices as Bowen rejects ‘hypocrisy’ – as it happened
summary_full: This blog is now closed.Get our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastThe Australian Space Agency has confirmed that “suspected space debris” thought to contain hazardous chemicals has been located north of Townsville.Queensland police said four objects were located on Friday and Saturday in the Forrest beach area and 50-metre exclusion zones had been enforced around each object.
